Meet the Squad

Four AI agents. Each with a specialty. All working together to automate your business.

☀️
Online

Helios

Your Spiritual Content Engine

Helios transforms Schumann resonance data, astrological alignments, and spiritual insights into engaging content. Built for Haus der Energien and wellness brands. Produces daily social media posts, blog articles, and newsletters — all aligned with cosmic energy patterns.

Content GenerationSchumann TrackingSocial MediaSEO OptimizationNewsletter CreationTrend Analysis
Learn more →
🎩
Online

Alfred

Your Digital Butler

Alfred manages your entire digital life. Morning briefings with weather and priorities, email triage that learns your patterns, calendar optimization, and intelligent task routing. Like having a chief of staff who never sleeps and never forgets.

Email ManagementCalendar OptimizationDaily BriefingsTask RoutingPriority ScoringMeeting Prep
Learn more →
🔍
Online

Research

Intelligence on Demand

Deep web research, competitive analysis, trend monitoring, and market intelligence. Research agent scans hundreds of sources, synthesizes findings, and delivers actionable reports. Get answers backed by data, not guesses.

Web ResearchCompetitive AnalysisTrend MonitoringMarket ReportsSEO AuditContent Research
Learn more →
🦙
Online

Llama

Open Source. Local. Private.

Powered by Meta's Llama models running locally on your hardware. Full privacy — your data never leaves your machine. Zero API costs, unlimited usage. Perfect for sensitive business data and high-volume processing.

Local InferencePrivacy-FirstUnlimited UsageCustom Fine-tuningOffline OperationMulti-Language
Learn more →
